title: stevia tunguraguensis
intro: Stevia tunguraguensis is a plant species in the sunflower family that is native to Ecuador and is closely related to the sweet-tasting Stevia rebaudiana. The medicinal properties of Stevia tunguraguensis include its potential anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant include its possible use in managing blood sugar levels, reducing blood pressure, and supporting cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Stevia tunguraguensis can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
